data.title: Hick's Law Application
data.description: Minimizes the time to make decisions by reducing options without overwhelming the user.
data.technical_spec: Simplified UI with focused content recommendations.

data.title: Fitts's Law Design
data.description: Optimizes the placement of interactive elements for easy access and enhanced usability.
data.technical_spec: Thumb-friendly button placement in mobile interfaces.

data.title: Miller’s Law Usage
data.description: Keeps information chunks within the user’s cognitive limits.
data.technical_spec: Guides and tutorials segmented into concise parts.

data.title: Jakob's Law of Internet Users Expectation
data.description: Aligns the interface to user expectations based on popular web conventions.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz Focus
data.description: Designs for simplicity and memorability by utilizing clear and unmistakable visuals.
